brand_identity.name: Black Star Threads
brand_identity.ethos: Afro-Futurist Luxury. Heritage Woven with Speed.
brand_identity.persona: The Modern Ashanti Royal. Values tradition but lives in the future.

theme.strategy: High-Contrast Editorial. Stark white backgrounds with deep black typography and rich gold accents.

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Product names. Always uppercase for H1/H2.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, Navigation, Price tags.

usage_rules.primary: Main text, Strong borders, Primary Buttons (Solid Black).
usage_rules.secondary: Thin accents, Hover states, 'Premium' badges, Price highlights.
usage_rules.accent_red: Sale tags, Error states, 'Limited Edition' markers. NEVER for main buttons.

spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A). Asymmetrical layouts. Use col-span-2 for feature items.
spacing.padding: Generous. Section padding: py-24 or py-32. Container padding: px-6 md:px-12.

effects.shadows: Sharp, hard shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] for cards on hover.
effects.gradients: Subtle noise overlays only. NO CSS gradients for backgrounds.
effects.glassmorphism: Used sparingly for sticky headers: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5.

images.placeholders: Use high-fashion, desaturated images. Avoid stocky 'smiling people shaking hands' photos.

assets.icons: Lucide React (thin stroke, stroke-width=1.5). Use 'Star' icon heavily as a brand element.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gold hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-4 px-8 border border-black
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-black border border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-4 px-8

cards.product: border border-transparent hover:border-black transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-black text-white p-8 relative overflow-hidden. Use gold text for accents.

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-black/20 focus:border-black outline-none rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-black/40 transition-all

landing_page.hero: Full-screen cinematic intro. Text overlay: 'THE BLACK STAR COLLECTION'. Parallax scrolling.
landing_page.featured_grid: Bento Grid. 1 Large item (left), 2 Small items (right stacked).
landing_page.ticker: Infinite marquee with 'GHANA • HERITAGE • LUXURY • SOCCER •' separator by Star icons.

product_page.layout: Split screen. Left: Sticky Product Details. Right: Scrollable Image Gallery (Simulating a lookbook).
product_page.add_to_cart: Fixed bottom bar on mobile. Sticky sidebar on desktop.

dashboard.vendor: Clean, data-dense. Use simple tables with mono-spaced numbers. Status badges: Outline only (no solid bg colors to avoid clutter).
dashboard.admin: Dark Mode Sidebar. White Content Area. High contrast for readability.

implementation_steps: 1. Setup Typography: Import Cinzel and Outfit in index.css. Update tailwind.config.js.
2. Setup Colors: Add custom colors to tailwind.config.js (ashanti-gold, midnight, bone-white).
3. Create Layouts: Build the 'BentoGrid' component and 'Marquee' component first.
4. Develop Components: Customize Shadcn buttons, inputs, and cards to match the 'Sharp/Brutalist' aesthetic.
5. Build Pages: Assemble Landing, Product Listing, and Detail pages using the new components.
6. Apply Animations: Add 'entrance' animations (fade-up) to all sections using Framer Motion.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards with rounded corners and soft shadows.
Do NOT use gradients on buttons.
Ensure all images have a subtle 'grayscale' filter that lifts on hover.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
